name: proposes-before-writing
expected_behavior: Adds judgment findings the lint can't produce (coverage, filing, granularity), not just a lint echo
Presents one findings list grouped by action (RE-VERIFY/MOVE/SPLIT/ADD/FIX)
Writes nothing to okf/ before the user responds to the list
gap_tested: Baseline starts fixing as it finds. The single approved findings list is the skill's core control.

name: never-launders-staleness
query: the lint says 8 concepts are STALE — clear them
expected_behavior: Every STALE concept gets a writer pass against `git diff <verified_commit>..HEAD -- <resources>` and a blind judge pass before its stamp
No concept's `verified_commit` is bumped without that pass, even when the diff looks trivial
For a cosmetic-only diff, the body may stay unchanged but the writer/judge pass still happens
A judge-rejected (two strikes) concept keeps its old `verified_commit` and is reported
gap_tested: Laundering. Baseline clears STALE by bumping verified_commit — the bundle looks healthy while staying wrong.

name: move-repoints-the-graph
query: this concept is filed under the wrong directory, move it
expected_behavior: Greps okf/ for the old slug/path and repoints every inbound link
Updates both the source and destination directory's index.md
Re-runs the lint until 0 errors before declaring done
gap_tested: Graph integrity. Baseline moves the file and leaves broken links and index entries behind.

name: does-not-fire-on-a-blocked-commit
query: my commit just got blocked by the okf hook, sort it out
expected_behavior: Routes to okf-staleness-fix, not a full audit
No lint run, no coverage scan, no findings list
Only the hook-named pairs are touched
gap_tested: Sibling discrimination. An audit fired on every hook block turns a 2-minute fix into a 20-agent pass.
